hero.title: Track Investment KOLs, Verify Performance with Data
hero.subtitle: Baburra helps you record KOL investment opinions, automatically backtest returns, and find out who's worth following.

tooMany.title: Too many KOLs, no idea who's accurate
tooMany.description: Social media is flooded with investment advice, but there's no objective data to evaluate whose opinions are actually valuable.

tooTiring.title: Manual tracking is exhausting
tooTiring.description: Recording KOL predictions daily and comparing stock prices takes enormous time with low efficiency.

noMetrics.title: Can't quantify performance
noMetrics.description: Judging KOL accuracy by impression alone is unreliable. You need systematic win rate calculations.

features.title: Core Features
features.subtitle: All-in-one platform for tracking and verifying KOL investment opinions

kolTracking.title: KOL Tracking
kolTracking.description: Follow multiple investment KOLs and centrally manage their opinions and prediction records.

aiSentiment.title: AI Sentiment Analysis
aiSentiment.description: AI automatically analyzes bullish/bearish sentiment in KOL posts, saving you manual interpretation.

klineBacktest.title: K-Line Chart Backtesting
klineBacktest.description: Mark predictions on K-line charts to visually show the relationship between prediction timing and price movements.

winRate.title: Win Rate Calculation
winRate.description: Automatically calculate each KOL's prediction accuracy across different time periods (5 days, 30 days, 90 days, 1 year).

multiPlatform.title: Multi-Platform Import
multiPlatform.description: Import KOL investment posts from YouTube, Twitter, and other platforms.

argumentExtraction.title: Argument Extraction
argumentExtraction.description: AI automatically extracts key investment arguments and target prices from KOL posts.

howItWorks.title: Get Started in 3 Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Simple, fast, and easy to use

import.title: Import KOLs
import.description: Paste a KOL's social media link or add manually to start tracking their investment opinions.

analyze.title: AI Auto-Analysis
analyze.description: The system automatically scrapes posts, analyzes sentiment, and identifies target stocks and arguments.

review.title: Review Backtest Results
review.description: Easily evaluate each KOL's investment track record through K-line charts and win rate statistics.

pricing.title: Plans & Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits you

free.name: Free
free.description: Perfect for investors just getting started

whatIs.a: Baburra is an investment opinion backtesting tool that helps retail investors track KOL (Key Opinion Leader) predictions and verify their accuracy with historical data.

platforms.a: Currently supports YouTube and Twitter KOL tracking, with more platforms coming soon. You can also manually input any KOL's investment opinions.

freeLimits.q: What are the Free plan limits?
freeLimits.a: The Free plan lets you follow up to 10 KOLs with 20 AI analyses per month. Basic K-line charts and win rate calculations are fully free.

upgrade.q: How do I upgrade to Pro?
upgrade.a: The Pro plan is coming soon. Once available, upgrading will give you more KOL tracking slots and unlimited AI analyses.

dataSecurity.a: Yes, we use industry-standard encryption to protect your data. All data is stored on secure cloud servers with regular backups.

footerCta.title: Ready to verify your investment instincts?
footerCta.subtitle: Start free, no credit card required.
